name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for DOMINUS
title: ''

---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Provider / Data Source

If this involves a new data source or provider:
- Provider name:
- API documentation URL:
- Authentication required? <!-- free / API key / OAuth2 -->
- Any restrictions or rate limits?

## Would you implement it?

Are you willing to submit a pull request for this feature?
